title: Encoding Scheme ID (0x50)
description: Triplet X'50' Encoding Scheme Identifier. Offsets 0 and 1 (length and TID) are standard and omitted from individual element mappings.

elements.name: Tlength
elements.description: Length of the triplet, including Tlength (offset 0).

elements.name: Tid
elements.description: Identifies the Encoding Scheme ID triplet (should be X'50').

elements.name: ESidCP
elements.description: Encoding Scheme Identifier for Code Page. See 'Triplet X'50' Semantics' in AFP reference.

elements.name: ESidUD
elements.description: Encoding Scheme Identifier for User Data (optional). See 'Triplet X'50' Semantics' in AFP reference.
